item.name: Island Tomato King
item.description: With just a single exposure to the sunlight outside of your bag, this island Tomato King shall be primed to bear you forth like the juiciest of steeds.

mount.name: Island Tomato King
mount.action: Summon forth your island Tomato King, a sovereign who rules with a strong and juicy─er, just hand.
mount.description: Grown in sunny Vylbrand, this king among produce was being shipped to distant lands when his crate was cast overboard in rough seas. He eventually arrived at a desert island, where he triumphed in a war with avaricious avians and won the heart of a local princess, together with whom he established the West Mandra Empire.
mount.tooltip:
I dunno about you, but I ain't
so keen on the notion of callin' a
bloody tomato Yer Grace.
- Tiny Trader
